notes: Level 7 manual review override shard for spell indexes 20-24 in generated discovery row order.
This packet added structured/runtime mechanics for Sequester, Simulacrum, Symbol, Teleport, and Temple of the Gods.

sequester::choice_or_mode.issue: The caster-chosen early ending condition is preserved in utility options, but runtime lacks first-class arbitrary condition/end trigger authoring fields.
sequester::choice_or_mode.recommendedTemplateChange: Add custom ending condition fields with range/visibility constraints.

sequester::vision_light_sound.issue: The target's Invisible condition is represented as STATUS_CONDITION and utility option.
sequester::vision_light_sound.recommendedTemplateChange: No additional visibility field required for this pass.

sequester::sensor_or_remote_perception.issue: Remote magical viewing prevention is preserved in utility options, but runtime lacks a first-class remote perception block field.
sequester::sensor_or_remote_perception.recommendedTemplateChange: Add remote magical viewing block fields.

sequester::created_object_or_structure.issue: The detector matched object targeting; Sequester affects an existing object or willing creature and creates no object or structure.

sequester::resource_or_consumption.issue: The creature's lack of need for food, water, or air is represented in utility options.
sequester::resource_or_consumption.recommendedTemplateChange: No resource field required for this pass.

sequester::social_or_knowledge_effect.issue: Divination targeting and magic detection blocks are preserved in utility options, but runtime lacks first-class divination/magic-detection immunity fields.
sequester::social_or_knowledge_effect.recommendedTemplateChange: Add divination targeting and magic detection block fields.

sequester::status_or_state_change.issue: Invisible and Unconscious suspended animation states are represented as STATUS_CONDITION effects.
sequester::status_or_state_change.recommendedTemplateChange: No additional status field required for this pass.

sequester::environmental_change.issue: No environmental surface/world change remains after review; the detector matched suspended-animation survival prose.

sequester::conditional_ending.issue: Damage-ending and custom early-ending conditions are preserved in status break triggers and utility options, but runtime lacks arbitrary visible-within-1-mile ending condition fields.
sequester::conditional_ending.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime customEndCondition data with triggerRange.

simulacrum::target_filter_or_eligibility.issue: Beast or Humanoid target eligibility and 10-foot casting presence are represented by target filter and utility options.
simulacrum::target_filter_or_eligibility.recommendedTemplateChange: No additional target field required for this pass.
simulacrum::target_filter_or_eligibility.recommendedJsonChange: Closed by targeting.filter.creatureTypes and UTILITY controlOptions.

simulacrum::summon_or_controlled_entity.issue: The simulacrum is represented as SUMMONING and utility options, but runtime lacks first-class copied-stat exceptions, half maximum Hit Points, cannot-cast-this-spell, cannot-rest, and cannot-level fields.

simulacrum::resource_or_consumption.issue: Repair cost of 100 GP per Hit Point is represented in HEALING description/options, but runtime lacks first-class paid repair fields.
simulacrum::resource_or_consumption.recommendedTemplateChange: Add repair cost per HP fields.

simulacrum::object_stats_or_damageabilit.issue: Half Hit Point maximum, damage repair, 0 HP snow reversion, and recast destruction are preserved in effects/options, but runtime lacks typed copied-entity HP maximum and destruction/reversion fields.
simulacrum::object_stats_or_damageabilit.recommendedTemplateChange: Add copied entity HP maximum and destruction/reversion fields.
simulacrum::object_stats_or_damageabilit.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime copiedEntityStats and destructionOutcome data.

simulacrum::environmental_change.issue: The ice or snow pile becoming the simulacrum is represented in utility options and summon data; no separate environmental change is needed for this pass.
simulacrum::environmental_change.recommendedJsonChange: Closed by SUMMONING and UTILITY controlOptions.

symbol::choice_or_mode.issue: Choosing Death, Discord, Fear, Pain, Sleep, or Stunning is represented by effects/options, but runtime lacks first-class mutually exclusive ward mode selection.

symbol::attack_or_save_modifier.issue: Death, Discord, Fear, Pain, Sleep, and Stunning saves are represented by separate effects/options, but runtime lacks once-per-turn area targeting and per-mode save routing tied to the chosen symbol.
symbol::attack_or_save_modifier.recommendedTemplateChange: Add chosen-mode save routing plus once-per-turn targeting fields.
symbol::attack_or_save_modifier.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime chosenWardEffect and oncePerTurnTargeting data.

symbol::terrain_or_surface.issue: Glyph coverage and object movement break distance are represented by spatial details and utility options.
symbol::terrain_or_surface.recommendedTemplateChange: No additional terrain field required for this pass.
symbol::terrain_or_surface.recommendedJsonChange: Closed by spatialDetails and UTILITY controlOptions.

symbol::vision_light_sound.issue: Nearly imperceptible glyph and triggered Dim Light are preserved, but runtime lacks first-class detectability DC and triggered light duration fields.
symbol::vision_light_sound.recommendedTemplateChange: Add detectability and triggered light fields.
symbol::vision_light_sound.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime detectability and triggeredLight data.

symbol::created_object_or_structure.issue: The detector matched the inscribed glyph; it is represented by spatial details and utility options, not a free-standing created object.

symbol::ward_alarm_or_trigger.issue: Trigger examples, creature-type refinements, password-like exclusions, and object movement breakage are preserved in utility options, but runtime lacks first-class configurable ward trigger/refinement fields.
symbol::ward_alarm_or_trigger.recommendedTemplateChange: Add configurable ward trigger, trigger refinement, and exclusion fields.

symbol::status_or_state_change.issue: Frightened, Incapacitated, Unconscious, and Stunned outcomes are represented as STATUS_CONDITION effects and options.
symbol::status_or_state_change.recommendedTemplateChange: No additional status field required for this pass.

symbol::conditional_ending.issue: The glyph can end without triggering if moved too far, and triggered light lasts 10 minutes before the spell ends; runtime lacks first-class moved-too-far break and triggered-duration ending fields.
symbol::conditional_ending.recommendedTemplateChange: Add object movement break and triggered duration ending fields.
symbol::conditional_ending.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime wardBreakDistance and triggeredDurationEnd data.
symbol::conditional_ending.closedReason: Closed by the glyph placement/trigger lifetime batch: structured markdown now records inscribed_ward_moved_beyond_distance and triggered_duration_expires, while runtime JSON has conditional endings for the 10-foot object movement break and the 10-minute post-trigger active duration.

teleport::choice_or_mode.issue: Creature group versus object target and familiarity category selection are represented in targeting/options, but runtime lacks first-class destination familiarity choice and outcome table fields.

teleport::vision_light_sound.issue: The detector matched visible target wording; line-of-sight targeting is represented.

teleport::travel_or_planar_movement.issue: Instant same-plane transport is represented by MOVEMENT and utility options.
teleport::travel_or_planar_movement.recommendedTemplateChange: No additional travel field required for this pass.
teleport::travel_or_planar_movement.recommendedJsonChange: Closed by MOVEMENT and UTILITY effects.

teleport::social_or_knowledge_effect.issue: Known destination, sigil-like permanent circle familiarity, linked object, and false destination categories are preserved in utility options, but runtime lacks first-class destination knowledge/familiarity fields.

teleport::environmental_change.issue: Similar area, off-target distance, random direction, and mishap rerolls are preserved in utility/damage effects, but runtime lacks first-class teleport deviation outcome fields.

temple-of-the-gods::choice_or_mode.issue: Appearance, illumination, windows, door access, opposed creature types, and permanence choices are represented in utility options.
temple-of-the-gods::choice_or_mode.recommendedTemplateChange: No additional choice field required for this pass.

temple-of-the-gods::attack_or_save_modif.issue: Opposed creature Charisma entry save and 1d4 d20 penalty are represented as effects/options, but runtime lacks first-class opposed-type save/penalty routing for selected creature types.
temple-of-the-gods::attack_or_save_modif.recommendedTemplateChange: Add opposed creature type save and d20 penalty fields.

temple-of-the-gods::terrain_or_surface.issue: Temple footprint and unoccupied cube placement are represented by area/spatial details and utility options.
temple-of-the-gods::terrain_or_surface.recommendedTemplateChange: No additional terrain field required for this pass.

temple-of-the-gods::vision_light_sound.issue: Illumination choice, opaque magical force, shimmer, and incense are preserved in utility options, but runtime lacks first-class selectable illumination and sensory atmosphere fields.
temple-of-the-gods::vision_light_sound.recommendedTemplateChange: Add selectable light and sensory atmosphere fields.
temple-of-the-gods::vision_light_sound.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime selectableIllumination and atmosphereSensory data.

temple-of-the-gods::illusion_or_disguise.issue: The detector matched shimmer/appearance language, but the temple is a conjured structure, not an illusion or disguise.

temple-of-the-gods::sensor_or_remote_per.issue: Divination sensor and targeting blocks are preserved in utility options, but runtime lacks first-class divination sensor/targeting protection fields.
temple-of-the-gods::sensor_or_remote_per.recommendedTemplateChange: Add divination sensor and targeting block fields.

temple-of-the-gods::created_object_or_st.issue: The temple structure is represented by area/spatial details and options, but runtime lacks first-class created structure properties for floor/walls/roof/door/windows/altar and physical passability.

temple-of-the-gods::travel_or_planar_mov.issue: Ethereal travel into the temple is blocked and preserved in utility options, but runtime lacks first-class ethereal travel block fields.

temple-of-the-gods::healing_or_restorati.issue: Bonus healing inside the temple is represented by a HEALING effect and utility option.
temple-of-the-gods::healing_or_restorati.recommendedTemplateChange: No additional healing field required for this pass.

temple-of-the-gods::object_stats_or_dama.issue: Disintegrate instantly destroys the temple, Dispel Magic cannot dispel it, and Antimagic Field has no effect; runtime preserves this in utility options but lacks created-structure damageability/interaction fields.
temple-of-the-gods::object_stats_or_dama.recommendedTemplateChange: Add created structure spell interaction and destruction fields.

temple-of-the-gods::status_or_state_chan.issue: Opposed creature entry blocking is represented as STATUS_CONDITION plus utility options.
temple-of-the-gods::status_or_state_chan.recommendedTemplateChange: No additional status field required for this pass.

temple-of-the-gods::environmental_change.issue: Mild temperature, incense, idol/altar, illumination choice, and appearance are preserved in utility options.
temple-of-the-gods::environmental_change.recommendedTemplateChange: No additional environmental field required for this pass.

temple-of-the-gods::conditional_ending.issue: Closed: Temple of the Gods now records daily same-spot permanence and Disintegrate destruction.
temple-of-the-gods::conditional_ending.recommendedTemplateChange: Closed by Duration Progression fields for repeated_casts and Conditional Ending Triggers disintegrate_targets_effect.
temple-of-the-gods::conditional_ending.recommendedJsonChange: Closed by runtime durationProgression and conditionalEndings data.
temple-of-the-gods::conditional_ending.closedReason: Temple of the Gods now records the year-long daily same-spot permanence rule and the Disintegrate destruction trigger in structured markdown and runtime JSON.
